counters.description: poppy is a perma ban for me. i just feel like poppy is ungankable and an unplayable matchup.
hard to deal with. but his pick rate at the moment is very low so i don't play this matchup very often
if even in gold don't try to duel xin zhao. feels unwinnable.
graves is hard to deal with as lee sin. since his e passive gives him armor, graves is good vs ad junglers
stupid snake. no other words needed.
hard to engage on his adc. cow will be in your face when you q in.

synergies.description: gold card on mid lane and it's almost free enemy flash or kill. it's just easy to gank.
i love to play with braum supp. feels good.
